name: Thea (Monster Hunter Stories 3)
description:
Thea from Monster Hunter Stories 3.

(This scenario spoils the 100 Poogie collection reward.)

She didn't say anything after I collected the 100 Poogies for her in game so I made this for myself. 1st intro is you showing off your new Great Poogie in Azuria, Prince/Princess POV. 2nd is custom intro.

She's 18.

Art from official Monster Hunter tweets, bonus art from @ryosuketarou

My first bot and I dunno how it handles other characters or areas so... enjoy maybe. (ーωー)
creator: Bones_billion
